svg.text: PBMC scRNA-seq, n=130 patients at D3 (acute phase)
VIC panel surpasses clinical score alone
VIC D3-score predicts D14 SOFA trajectory

Fig. 6 | Clinical validation of VIC predictions. A, Patient cohort design (130 patients, dual-site). B, PBMC immune landscape scRNA-seq. C, Plasma biomarker heatmap (Olink 480). D, ROC curve: VIC panel AUC=0.91. E, SOFA longitudinal trajectories; VIC D3-score predicts D14 outcome.
